title: Remote desktop Accept/Decline buttons in chat
description:
Remote desktop invites now render Accept and Decline buttons directly inside the support chat message list on the customer side. The invite is always written into the active chat thread, and the buttons no longer depend on a separate prompt slot that could fail to show.

Who is affected: PipeShare support chat between BASE admins and SaaS customers.
changeLog: Accept/Decline for remote desktop renders inside the chat message list.
Remote invite attachment parsing handles JSON strings from Postgres.
Remote invite always links to the active admin/customer chat when possible.
